steps: No setup required — the Agent Discovery Protocol Registry is a public API
Use the /api/services endpoint to search for services by intent
Use the /api/services/{domain} endpoint to get a specific service manifest
Use the /api/services/{domain}/capabilities endpoint to list capabilities
Use the /api/services/{domain}/capabilities/{name} endpoint to get capability details
notes: This is the Agent Discovery Protocol registry — it is a public, free API
No authentication is required for read operations
The registry indexes services that implement the /.well-known/agent specification
Services can be searched semantically by intent (e.g., 'send email', 'create invoice')

test_endpoint.description: List the first 5 services in the registry
